<!--
Conventions (see also the deferred-capability issue template):

- Closing a tracked issue: put `Closes #N` in THIS body. Partial progress:
  write "toward #N" instead — GitHub auto-closes on the closes-keyword even
  in prose, which marks work done early.
- Spec-first: if this PR introduces a convention or capability, the
  foundation-doc update (docs/specs/…) is part of the PR, not a follow-up.
- Review findings get fixed in-PR or filed as issues — never a verbal
  "future cleanup".
- Deploy note: after merge, rebuild/kickstart the touched service(s);
  dashboard changes verify with `npm run build`, not `tsc --noEmit`.
-->
